questions.question: Which mirror is used as a rear-view mirror in vehicles?
questions.explanation: Convex mirrors give a wider field of view as they are curved outwards. They also always produce an erect and diminished image.

questions.question: The refractive index of glass is 1.5. What is the speed of light in glass?
questions.explanation: Speed of light in medium = (Speed of light in vacuum) / (Refractive index). So, V = (3 x 10^8) / 1.5 = 2 x 10^8 m/s.

questions.question: A lens has a power of -2.0 D. What is its focal length and type?
questions.explanation: f = 1/P. f = 1/(-2.0) = -0.5 m = -50 cm. Negative focal length indicates a concave lens.
